$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor tooling.

out.description: Output file path for generated data, relative to the config file.

items.description: Browser engine to measure fonts in.

browsers.description: Default browsers used to measure every font.

name.description: Unique identifier used to reference this set from font items.

chars.description: String of characters to measure as part of this set.

symbolSets.description: Reusable symbol set definitions referenced by fonts.

font.description: Path to the font file, resolved relative to the config file.

family.description: CSS font-family name to register and measure.

browsers.description: Override the top-level browsers list for this font.

items.description: Browser engine to measure fonts in.

symbolSets.description: Override the top-level symbol sets for this font.

items.description: The name of a top-level symbolSets entry.
